center.name: Kalimpong district
center.summary: Kalimpong district is a district in the state of West Bengal, India.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |last3=Rahut |first3=Biswapriya |journal=Indian Birds |volume=14 |pages=71–73 |title=The status of the Black-rumped Magpie Pica (pica) bottanensis in India |url=https://indianbirds.in/pdfs/IB_14_3_PrysJones_Rasmussen_BlackrumpedMagpie.pdf |access-date=2026-02-18}} One in Kalimpong district, West Bengal, on 9 May 2023 was the first verified Indian record. It is found in farmland and other semi-open habitat like farming districts, parks or gardens, and usually close to human habitation, at least in Bhutan. They are uncommon in the highest altitudes, but have been observed as high as , with nests at
